tweetText: AI chip startup Cerebras has filed for an IPO after securing major deals with Amazon Web Services and OpenAI. This move highlights the growing demand for advanced AI hardware as companies invest heavily in AI development. via TechCrunch AI

Anthropic is maintaining communication with Trump administration officials despite being labeled a supply-chain risk by the Pentagon. This could signal a shift in relationships that may impact tech regulations and support. via TechCrunch AI
The App Store is seeing a surge in new app launches, likely driven by AI tools. This boom indicates how AI is transforming the mobile software landscape. via TechCrunch AI
Schematik is a new tool designed to help users code for physical devices safely. This could make hardware programming more accessible and innovative. via WIRED AI
